page_content:
LARC266 Site and Landscape Ecology Field Studies (1 Credit)

Field Excursions that are essential to apply theory and principles explored in the LARC265 to real world environments.

Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in LARC230 or LARC640.

Corequisite: LARC265.

Restriction: Sophomore standing or higher; and must be in Landscape Architecture program.

Additional Information: This course requires field trips.
